channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Details emerge after fatal shooting involving suspect near the White House
item.description: A fatal shooting near the White House in Washington has prompted renewed scrutiny of security incidents around the US presidential complex. According to US media reports and court documents, a 21-year...

item.title: Kaze says Kaizer Chiefs management will decide coaching future after improved season
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Cedric Kaze says the club’s management will decide whether he and fellow co-coach Khalil Ben Youssef remain in charge for next season after Amakhosi finished third in the Premie...

item.title: Behind-the-scenes photos of Gong Li during the filming of Raise the Red Lantern (1991)
item.description: This article highlights a collection of behind-the-scenes photographs of acclaimed actress Gong Li during the production of the 1991 film “Raise the Red Lantern,” directed by Zhang Yimou. The film is ...

item.title: Police investigate wrong-way HiLux crash incidents on Tuggeranong Parkway in Canberra
item.description: ACT Policing is investigating a series of collisions involving a white Toyota HiLux that was allegedly travelling against traffic on the Tuggeranong Parkway in Canberra on Saturday night, 23 May 2026....

item.title: PNP assures protection for families of missing sabungeros amid alleged intimidation claims linked to Atong Ang camp
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has announced that it is ready to extend security protection to the families of the missing sabungeros, or cockfighting enthusiasts, following reports that they ma...

item.title: AIIMS team reaches Bhopal for second autopsy in Twisha Sharma death case as father expresses hope for justice
item.description: The case related to the death of Twisha Sharma, a Noida-based model-turned-actor, has intensified as a medical team from AIIMS reached Bhopal to conduct a second post-mortem examination. The fresh aut...

item.title: Durban City secure Top 8 finish despite poor run as Dladla reflects on demanding season
item.description: Durban City ended their debut Betway Premiership campaign with a Top 8 finish despite losing 1-0 to AmaZulu at Chatsworth Stadium. Although the club finished the season on a disappointing nine-match w...

item.title: How inflated ARR metrics are used to promote and legitimize AI startups
item.description: Article from TechCrunch investigates concerns among founders, investors, and finance professionals about the misuse and inflation of annual recurring revenue (ARR) metrics in the AI startup ecosystem....

item.title: Akwa Ibom Begins Enforcement Against Unregistered Scrap Dealers Over Environmental Law Compliance
item.description: The Akwa Ibom State Government has commenced a statewide enforcement operation targeting unregistered scrap dealers and scavengers as part of efforts to improve environmental safety and curb criminal ...

item.title: Ayush Ministry Pushes Yoga as Global Wellness Tool and Preventive Healthcare Strategy
item.description: Ayush Ministry Secretary Vaidya Rajesh Kotecha has said that yoga has emerged as one of India’s strongest instruments of cultural outreach and global soft power, with growing acceptance in more than 1...

item.title: Gunman killed after opening fire near White House security checkpoint
item.description: A shooting incident near the White House on Saturday evening resulted in the death of a 21-year-old Maryland man, identified as Nasire Best, after he opened fire at a US Secret Service security checkp...

item.title: OK Movement Coordinator criticises presidential aide Onanuga over comments on Peter Obi

item.title: Anthony Hopkins’ Early Years in the British Army Before His Acting Career
item.description: The article explores an often overlooked chapter in the early life of acclaimed actor Anthony Hopkins: his compulsory military service in the British Army during the late 1950s. Before achieving globa...

item.description: As the Islamabad High Court (IHC) prepares to resume hearing on the long-running One Constitution Avenue project dispute, new information has surfaced in the court record revealing key historical and ...

item.title: Augustus Muli Calls for Ukambani Unity and 5-Million Vote Strategy Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: NLP leader Augustus Kyalo Muli has publicly urged Wiper Party leader Stephen Kalonzo Musyoka to rally Ukambani leaders into a united political and development front ahead of the 2027 general elections...

item.title: Gunman shot dead after opening fire near White House security checkpoint; reporter incident caught on camera
item.description: A shooting incident occurred near the White House on Saturday, 23 May, when a man opened fire at a Secret Service security checkpoint located at 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue in Washington, D.C....

item.title: Pura Luka Vega says art and self-expression continue to inspire their fearless advocacy
item.description: Drag artist and LGBTQIA+ figure Pura Luka Vega shared their thoughts on remaining fearless in expressing their creativity and identity through art. In the interview published by ABS-CBN, Vega emphasiz...

item.title: Lucien Lelong and His Role in Preserving Parisian Haute Couture During WWII
item.description: Lucien Lelong (1889–1958) was a prominent French couturier who played a crucial role in preserving the integrity and global leadership of Parisian haute couture during the early to mid-20th century. R...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Achieves Record Efficiency as Purpose-Built Robotaxi
item.description: Tesla’s upcoming Cybercab robotaxi has been officially certified at 165 Wh/mi, making it the most energy-efficient electric vehicle ever produced, according to reporting from Electrek. Tesla Vice Pres...

item.title: ADC unveils Zakari Mohammed as Kwara State governorship candidate for 2027 elections and presents other nominees
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has announced former House of Representatives member, Zakari Mohammed, as its governorship candidate for the 2027 Kwara State election. Mohammed, who represented ...
